name: Zhejiang Tony Electronic Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Tony Electronic Co., Ltd researches, manufactures, and markets ultra-fine alloy wires and other metal matrix composites. The company offers ultra-fine conductors and laminating wires for use in electronic, new energy automobile, medical apparatus, and intelligent robot fields. It also provides diamond cutting lines for cutting crisp and hard materials, such as silicon and sapphire; and plate lugs that are used in the power battery of new energy automobiles. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Huzhou, China.
